ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "game_description" TEXT /* Description of the game */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "game_release_date" TEXT /* Date the game was released */,
  "game_genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game */,
  "game_developer" TEXT /* Developer of the game */,
  "game_publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ranking_tiers" (
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking tier */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the tier belongs to */,
  "tier_name" TEXT /* Name of the ranking tier */,
  "tier_description" TEXT /* Description of the ranking tier */,
  "tier_requirements" TEXT /* Requirements to achieve the tier */,
  "tier_icon" TEXT /* URL or path to the tier icon */,
  "tier_ranking_points" INTEGER /* Points required to reach the tier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ranking_tiers_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "odds_groups" (
  "odds_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each odds group */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the odds group belongs to */,
  "odds_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the odds group */,
  "odds_group_description" TEXT /* Description of the odds group */,
  "odds_probability" REAL /* Probability of winning in the odds group */,
  "odds_icon" TEXT /* URL or path to the odds icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("odds_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_odds_groups_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the reward belongs to */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of the reward (e.g., item, currency, bonus) */,
  "reward_name" TEXT /* Name of the reward */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "reward_icon" TEXT /* URL or path to the reward icon */,
  "reward_rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the reward */,
  "reward_value" REAL /* Monetary value of the reward */,
  "reward_probability" REAL /* Probability of winning the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reward_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward assignment */,
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ranking tier the reward is assigned to */,
  "odds_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the odds group the reward is assigned to */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reward being assigned */,
  "reward_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the reward being assigned */,
  "reward_probability" REAL /* Probability of winning the reward in the assignment */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Additional description for the reward assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reward_assignments_reward_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_id") REFERENCES rewards ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reward_assignments_tier_id FOREIGN KEY ("tier_id") REFERENCES ranking_tiers ("tier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reward_assignments_odds_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("odds_group_id") REFERENCES odds_groups ("odds_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the player is playing */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "player_email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Status of the player (e.g., active, inactive, banned) */,
  "player_joined_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the platform */,
  "player_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the player's last login */,
  "player_level" INTEGER /* Player's level in the game */,
  "player_points" INTEGER /* Points accumulated by the player */,
  "player_profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the player's profile picture */,
  "player_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_player_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player ranking */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being ranked */,
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ranking tier the player is in */,
  "ranking_from" INTEGER /* Ranking of the player from the start of the game */,
  "ranking_to" INTEGER /* Ranking of the player at the end of the game */,
  "player_ranking_points" INTEGER /* Points that contributed to the player's ranking */,
  "player_ranking_date" TEXT /* Date when the player achieved the ranking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_rankings_tier_id FOREIGN KEY ("tier_id") REFERENCES ranking_tiers ("tier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_rankings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reward_redemptions" (
  "redemption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward redemption */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player redeeming the reward */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reward being redeemed */,
  "redemption_date" TEXT /* Date the reward was redeemed */,
  "redemption_status" TEXT /* Status of the redemption (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "redemption_method" TEXT /* Method of redemption (e.g., in-game, email, mail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("redemption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reward_redemptions_reward_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_id") REFERENCES rewards ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reward_redemptions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the event belongs to */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "event_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., upcoming, active, completed) */,
  "event_participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the event */,
  "event_prize_pool" REAL /* Total prize pool for the event */,
  "event_rules" TEXT /* Rules of the event */,
  "event_banner" TEXT /* URL or path to the event banner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_rewards" (
  "event_reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event reward */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the reward belongs to */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reward being assigned */,
  "event_reward_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the reward being assigned */,
  "event_reward_probability" REAL /* Probability of winning the event reward */,
  "event_reward_description" TEXT /* Additional description for the event reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_rewards_reward_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_id") REFERENCES rewards ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_rewards_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_icon" TEXT /* URL or path to the role icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
